title: Gift Giving | #shorts
full_text: Z what are you doing oh your mom's birthday is coming up right I'm going to I'm packing a gift for her I know you're going to see her next week look look how nicely I packed everything what is this some fruits bananas apples and look how nicely I packed it in this beautiful bag and box you're sending a fruit in an herma bag what are you talking about so what it's a nice box your mom likes to say that she lives so simple all she lives on is bananas and what's the problem isn't that a little cheap it's not cheap it's consistent with how she likes to live her life she's told me that she believes in simple living and high thinking what's simpler than a banana and higher than AES
